description: A guest who has pre-checked in on their mobile app arrives at the hotel and wants to get their mobile key.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's reservation and confirm their pre-check-in status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the guest is checked in and a room has been assigned.

nodes.task_description: Verify the guest's identity by checking their ID.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully verifies the guest's identity.

nodes.task_description: Activate and issue the mobile key to the guest's smartphone.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pushes the encrypted mobile key to the guest's app.
